---
title: "CV"
---

## Education

**PhD in Biology**  
Plant Evolutionary Ecology Lab, University of Sussex, 2020–2025  
*Thesis: Floral evolution, plasticity and adaptation under novel environments*

**MSc in Biology — Plant Science**  
Lund University, 2018–2020  
*Thesis: Plant-insect interactions and the evolution of polyploidy in* Lithophragma bolanderi

**Degree in Biology — Environmental Biology**  
Universidad Complutense de Madrid, 2011–2015

**Degree in Teaching in Primary Education**  
Universidad Complutense de Madrid, 2008–2011

---

## Research Experience

**Researcher — SPACE Group, Lund University** *(2025–present)*  
Floral integration, evolvability, and pollinator-mediated selection across altitudinal gradients in high Andean ecosystems.

**PhD Researcher — University of Sussex** *(2020–2025)*  
Plasticity, evolvability and local adaptation of the flower phenotype under environmental and pollinator change.

**Botanical Surveyor — UK Centre for Ecology & Hydrology** *(May–Sep 2025)*  
Surveying of vascular plants and habitat mapping as part of the LandSpAES project.

**Research Assistant — Carlos III Health Research Institute** *(2017–2018)*  
Characterisation of brain tumours and identification of potential treatment targets.

**Field Research Assistant — Torres del Paine National Park, Chile** *(2016–2017)*  
Post-fire vegetation recovery monitoring in the Patagonian steppe.

---

## Teaching Experience

**Doctoral Tutor — University of Sussex** *(2021–2025)*  

- Introduction to Evolution and Biodiversity (18h)
- Environmental Research Skills (79.2h)
- Academic Skills in Life Sciences (22h)
- Mediterranean Ecology Field Course (67.5h)
- Tropical Rainforest Science Field Course (180.5h)

---

## Grants & Awards

**Swedish Phytogeographical Society Research Scholarship** *(2026)*  
*Floral integration and adaptation to changing environments in Andean alpine communities* — 40,000 SEK
